title: 🕳 Echo-Void Constructs
name: Echo-Void Constructs
what_it_is: Spaces built from what remains *after* meaning is gone—resonant hollows where only the memory of presence lingers, a geometry of absence.
how_to_use: she stands in an echo-void—her outline carved from the absence of light and story
his speech is felt, not heard—a negative space in sound, a void that whispers
animation_behavior: Words echo backward, space ripples with phantom impact, scenes collapse into emptiness ---
